wrong_choice_explanations.台: 台 is used for counting machines and vehicles — it doesn't fit here because cats are animals, not machines.
wrong_choice_explanations.人: 人 is used for counting people — it doesn't fit here because cats are animals, not humans.
wrong_choice_explanations.本: 本 is used for long thin objects — it doesn't fit here because cats are living creatures, not objects.
